title: YTP: Crank That Shark Boy (Part 2 - Mr. Electric Boogaloo)
description:
In this FINALLY FINISHED video, Shlumpboy and Labiagirl drool over planet drool.

MAN I can't tell you how great it feels to have this finished! I've been on and off of it for years and you have been so patient waiting for it. It's a good thing there's no more in the Robert Rodriguez creepy 3D universe? Right? Right?

___________________________________________________
